# EduExpress International

> Study abroad consultancy based in Dhaka, Bangladesh, operating since 2018.
> FREE scholarship assistance, 98% visa success rate, 3,000+ students placed,
> 150+ partner universities across 9 countries. Official representative of top
> universities in Europe and Asia.

## Company Facts

- Founded: 2018
- Head office: House: 12/1, Ground Floor, Road: 4/A, Dhanmondi, Dhaka 1209, Bangladesh
- Phone / WhatsApp: +880 1983-333566, +880 1329-663505
- Email: info@eduexpressint.com
- Office hours: Saturday-Thursday 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM (Friday closed)
- Specialty: Study in China with full scholarships (CSC, provincial, university scholarships)

## Study Destinations

- [China](https://eduexpressint.com/destinations/china): Full scholarships (CSC, Confucius Institute, provincial, university presidential), free tuition and hostel options, no-IELTS admission with MOI, top-100 QS universities. Intakes: March & September. Tuition $2,500-6,000/yr, living $200-400/mo.
- [South Korea](https://eduexpressint.com/destinations/south-korea): GKS scholarship, top universities (SNU, KAIST, Yonsei).
- [United Kingdom](https://eduexpressint.com/destinations/united-kingdom): University applications and student visa support.
- [Hungary](https://eduexpressint.com/destinations/hungary): Stipendium Hungaricum scholarship, Semmelweis, Debrecen, ELTE.
- [Finland](https://eduexpressint.com/destinations/finland): Affordable quality education.
- [Cyprus](https://eduexpressint.com/destinations/cyprus): Affordable education and easy visa.
- [Croatia](https://eduexpressint.com/destinations/croatia): EU study destination.
- [Georgia](https://eduexpressint.com/destinations/georgia): Medical education (MBBS) focus.
- [Malaysia](https://eduexpressint.com/destinations/malaysia): Affordable international programs.

## Services

- [Services overview](https://eduexpressint.com/services): University selection & applications, visa assistance (98% success), scholarship support (free), career guidance, documentation, pre-departure orientation.
- [Partner universities directory](https://eduexpressint.com/universities): Searchable list of 150+ partner universities with tuition, majors, and intakes.
- [Scholarship assessment](https://eduexpressint.com/scholarship-assessment): Free eligibility evaluation.
- [Updates & news](https://eduexpressint.com/updates): Scholarship deadlines, visa updates, university announcements.
- [B2B partnership program](https://eduexpressint.com/partnership): For education agents and institutions.
- [Contact](https://eduexpressint.com/contact): Book a free consultation.

## Scholarships We Process

- Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC) - full tuition + stipend + dormitory
- Confucius Institute Scholarship
- Chinese Provincial Government Scholarships
- University Presidential Scholarships (China)
- Stipendium Hungaricum (Hungary)
- GKS - Global Korea Scholarship (South Korea)
